title: Veinminer Enchantment
description: New enchantment for pickaxes to mine multiple matching connected ores!
body:
# Veinminer Enchantment

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ly-veinminer-enchantment?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ly-veinminer-enchantment)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)
[![Donate](https://shields.io/badge/ko--fi-donate-ff5f5f?logo=ko-fi)](https://ko-fi.com/lullaby45743)
[![Donate](https://shields.io/badge/paypal-donate-ff5f5f?logo=paypal&color=blue)](https://paypal.me/lucianobrumer)

<hr>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/c8j6L7ylBBE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

## 📖 Description

New enchantment for pickaxes to mine multiple matching connected ores! (only vanilla pickaxes and vanilla ores)

Compatible with Fortune and Silk Touch!

What is the difference with the popular Veinminer Data Pack? the differences are:
- Better performance.
- Does not require another Data Pack to work.
- The pickaxe is damaged with each extra mined block.
- If the block you mine gives you XP, so do the other blocks.
- Compatible with [Smelting](https://modrinth.com/datapack/smelting-enchantment) and [Magnetic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/magnetic-enchantment) Enchantments!

The enchantment can be obtained from the enchantment table, loot chests or trading with villagers.

---

## ⚠️ Incompatibilities

Not compatible with:
- [Configurable Despawn Timer](https://modrinth.com/mod/configurable-despawn-timer)
- [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad)

---

## ⌨️ Commands

Give:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot veinminer_enchantment:veinminer
```

Enchant:

```mcfunction
/enchant @s veinminer_enchantment:veinminer
```
